name: X-Ray Spotter
description: Spot fractures and pathologies on X-Ray plates.

challenges.chief_complaint: Deformity and severe pain in mid-thigh after high-impact road traffic accident.
challenges.desc: Tap the clear transverse fracture line located in the mid-shaft of the femur.

challenges.chief_complaint: Chronic mechanical knee pain, stiffness, and crepitus upon weight bearing.
challenges.desc: Tap the narrow joint space of the medial knee compartment showing severe osteophytes.

challenges.chief_complaint: Acute shoulder pain, loss of round contour, and arm held in slight abduction after fall.
challenges.desc: Tap the dislocated humeral head sitting anteriorly relative to the glenoid cavity.
